text: Make buildworld on 11.0-RELEASE on BananaPro fails. Typescript of the make, as well as reported files sqlite3-5fdd35.c and sqlite3-5fdd35.sh are available on my drive.google here https://drive.google.com/open?id=0B3OSqHXSWtQzcENfUTF0NEFZd2M , since they are too large to be uploaded here.
